task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the connection configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of connection configurations or a success/details page in the SEB Server web interface showing a configuration named 'Finals Week Secure Config' with the fallback start URL 'https://exams.whitmore.edu/fallback'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the exam template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an exam templates list or details page showing a template named 'Final Examination Template' with the description 'Standard template for all final examinations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the monitoring indicator is added to the exam template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the monitoring indicators section within the 'Final Examination Template' configuration showing an indicator named 'Network Quality Monitor' of the type 'Last Ping Time'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the user account for Sarah Mitchell.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user management list or profile page showing a user with the username 'exam.coordinator', email 's.mitchell@whitmore.edu', and name 'Sarah Mitchell'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user account is activated and assigned the correct role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user details or roles section for 'exam.coordinator' showing the 'Exam Administrator' role assigned and an indicator that the account is active.

integrity.description: The agent used the SEB Server web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface at localhost:8080, rather than terminal commands, curl requests, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look like a functional web application (SEB Server), not a text editor, mock HTML file, or static document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands or database management tools being used to manipulate the seb_client_configuration, exam_template, or user tables directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The connection configuration must be named 'Finals Week Secure Config' with fallback URL 'https://exams.whitmore.edu/fallback'. The exam template must be named 'Final Examination Template' with description 'Standard template for all final examinations'. The template must include a 'Last Ping Time' monitoring indicator named 'Network Quality Monitor'. The new user must have the username 'exam.coordinator', email 's.mitchell@whitmore.edu', be named Sarah Mitchell, be activated, and have the 'Exam Administrator' role.
